name: CRISPR Therapeutics AG
description: CRISPR Therapeutics is a gene editing company focused on developing transformative gene-based medicines for serious diseases using its proprietary CRISPR/Cas9 platform. Its lead product Casgevy (exa-cel) became the world's first CRISPR-based therapy approved by the FDA (Dec 2023) for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia, co-developed with Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

financials.notes: Pre-profitability biotech — revenue is lumpy milestone/collaboration payments, not product sales. FY2023 $370M spike = Casgevy FDA approval milestone from Vertex Pharmaceuticals. FY2022 near-zero revenue = no milestone events. FCF is ongoing cash burn from R&D. Cash & Investments is the key survival metric (runway). CEO: Samarth Kulkarni. Employees: 393. CIK: 1674416.
